mapper.insert: insert into agent_exec_log (id, case_id, test_plan_id, test_plan_case_id, last_exec_result, executed_by, steps_snapshot, content, create_time, create_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{testPlanCaseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastExecResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepsSnapshot,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select * from agent_exec_log where id = #{id} limit 1
